name: UNION BANKSHARES INC
business: Union Bankshares, Inc. is a community bank holding company that provides retail banking, commercial banking, municipal banking, and wealth management and trust services to individuals, small and medium businesses, nonprofits, and local governments in northern Vermont and New Hampshire.

exposures.sentence: We have begun piloting artificial intelligence ( AI ) and machine learning tools in certain internal and support functions, such as data analysis, fraud monitoring support, compliance processes, and operational efficiency initiatives.
